<!-- e.g., "I'm frustrated when I try to..." -->

<!-- Describe how you envision this feature working -->

## 📊 Impact Assessment

**Who would benefit from this feature?**
<!-- e.g., "All users", "Career changers", "Academic users", etc. -->

**How often would this be used?**
<!-- e.g., "Every CV creation", "Occasionally", "Specific use cases" -->

**Priority level** (in your opinion):
- [ ] Critical - Skill is unusable without this
- [ ] High - Significantly improves user experience
- [ ] Medium - Nice to have, improves quality of life
- [ ] Low - Minor enhancement

- [ ] New CV format/industry template
- [ ] Enhanced job description analysis
- [ ] Better ATS optimization
- [ ] Additional examples or documentation
- [ ] New interaction pattern or workflow

- [ ] Accessibility improvements

## ✅ Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues to ensure this isn't a duplicate
- [ ] I have provided clear motivation for this feature
- [ ] I have included example usage scenarios
- [ ] I have considered the impact on existing functionality

## 🤝 Contribution

<!-- Would you be willing to help implement this feature? -->

- [ ] I'm willing to submit a PR for this feature
- [ ] I can help with testing
- [ ] I can provide additional examples or documentation
- [ ] I can offer domain expertise
